keyFeatures.en: Converts text to speech with various voices and speeds
keyFeatures.zh: 将文本转换为多种声音和速度的语音

description.en: Unlimited text conversion, 100MB storage, 1000 monthly credits
description.zh: 无限文本转换，100MB存储空间，每月1000积分

description.en: Unlimited text conversion, 1GB storage, 10,000 monthly credits, commercial use allowed
description.zh: 无限文本转换，1GB存储空间，每月10,000积分，允许商业使用

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for voice and speed
weaknesses.zh: 声音和速度的自定义选项有限

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses looking for text-to-speech conversion
targetAudience.zh: 寻求文本转语音转换的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Speechify is a versatile text-to-speech tool with multiple language and format support, ideal for individuals and small businesses.
positioning.zh: Speechify 是一款多功能的文本转语音工具，支持多种语言和格式，适合个人和小型企业使用
